address.description: Primary street and/or unit address. Required only if country is USA or Canada.

city.description: City. Required only if Country is United States / Canada.

country.description: Country. For US addresses, this value should be "United States". For other countries, this should be the full country name (Canada, United Kingdom, ...)

postalCode.description: Zip. Required only if Country is United States / Canada.

stateRegion.description: State. Required only if Country is United States / Canada.
